title: Charge case outside screen/third screen, right zoom in/out
feature: QSG (Quick Start Guide) - Third Screen / Charge Case
scenario: Verify zoom in/out functionality on the third screen (charge case outside) by clicking the right circle button to zoom in and out.
steps: Swipe to the third screen (charge case outside)
Click the right circle button to zoom in (new text should appear)
Click the right circle button again to zoom out to the original screen with charge case outside
expected: The screen zooms in on the third screen (charge case outside) with new text appearing, then zooms out to the original screen with charge case outside.
